untranslatable_reason: Signal requires definition of 'significantly higher/lower' gap threshold which is marked AUTHOR_SILENT. Gap magnitude threshold cannot be determined without explicit parameter values. Additionally, exit conditions are AUTHOR_SILENT with no clear reversal logic provided.
translation_notes: Translated core logic: long entry when open > prev_close (gap up), short entry when open < prev_close (gap down). Exit conditions implemented as reversal signals (close out longs on gap down, close out shorts on gap up) as reasonable default for momentum-continuation strategy. However, without the 'threshold' parameter specifying what constitutes a 'significant' gap, this rule is incomplete. Backtest period: July 16, 2004 to May 17, 2012; Target instrument: FSTX (Dow Jones STOXX 50 index futures on Eurex); Backtest Sharpe: 1.4
